title: Tech Mahindra is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Tech Mahindra is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Tech Mahindra has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tech Mahindra:
Tech Mahindra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tech Mahindra!
